## HierarchicalFilter class

Renders a hierarchical filter recursively, emitting the needed events when clicked.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
export default class HierarchicalFilter extends Vue 
```
<b>Extends:</b> Vue

## Properties

|  Property | Modifiers | Type | Description |
|  --- | --- | --- | --- |
|  [childrenAnimation?](./x-components.hierarchicalfilter.childrenanimation.md) |  | Vue \| string | <i>(Optional)</i> The animation component to use for the children filters. |
|  [clickEvents](./x-components.hierarchicalfilter.clickevents.md) |  | Partial&lt;[XEventsTypes](./x-components.xeventstypes.md)<!-- -->&gt; | Additional events, with their payload, to emit when the filter is clicked. |
|  [filter](./x-components.hierarchicalfilter.filter.md) |  | HierarchicalFilterModel | The filter data to render. |
